Subject: TE Restriction for Oct 20-21
Message:
October 19, 2001

Due to the unplanned outage at the ATHENS (ATH) Ohio Compressor station,
TEXAS EASTERN TRANSMISSION, LP (TE) will not be accepting due pipe
makeup for Gas Days October 20-21, 2001. TABS parties are expected to
remain in balance and meter operators are reminded to flow at scheduled
volumes. These restrictions are in affect through the weekend.

Should you have any questions, please contact your Operations Account
Manager.
